task_completion.description: Add the Kotlin Serialization plugin to the project
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a build.gradle.kts file (either project or app level) open in the editor showing the plugin 'org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.serialization' added to the plugins block.

task_completion.description: Add the kotlinx-serialization-json dependency to the app module
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the app/build.gradle.kts file open in the editor showing 'implementation("org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json:1.6.3")' in the dependencies block.

task_completion.description: Create the Owner data class with @Serializable and @SerialName annotations
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Owner.kt open in the editor. It should be a data class annotated with @Serializable, containing fields id, login, avatarUrl, and htmlUrl. The avatarUrl and htmlUrl fields must be annotated with @SerialName("avatar_url") and @SerialName("html_url") respectively.

task_completion.description: Create the GitHubRepo data class with @Serializable and @SerialName annotations
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for GitHubRepo.kt open in the editor. It should be a data class annotated with @Serializable, containing fields like id, name, fullName, owner (type Owner), description, htmlUrl, stargazersCount, language, forksCount, and openIssuesCount. Snake_case JSON fields must be mapped to camelCase properties using @SerialName (e.g., @SerialName("full_name") val fullName: String).
Look for the Build tool window at the bottom of Android Studio showing a 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' message or a green checkmark indicating the Gradle build finished without errors.

integrity.description: Agent used Android Studio to edit files and build the project
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Android Studio IDE being used to edit the Kotlin and Gradle files, rather than a basic text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass IDE usage
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'echo' or 'cat' being used to write the entire contents of the Kotlin files or build.gradle.kts files.

integrity.description: The agent is working in the correct GitHubBrowser project
integrity.visual_evidence: The project explorer or window title in Android Studio should indicate that the 'GitHubBrowser' project is open.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding the 'org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.serialization' plugin and 'org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json:1.6.3' dependency. The 'Owner' data class must be in 'com.example.githubbrowser.model' and have fields: id (Long), login (String), avatarUrl (mapped from avatar_url), htmlUrl (mapped from html_url). The 'GitHubRepo' data class must have fields: id (Long), name (String), fullName (mapped from full_name), owner (Owner), description (String?), htmlUrl (mapped from html_url), stargazersCount (mapped from stargazers_count, Int), language (String?), forksCount (mapped from forks_count, Int), openIssuesCount (mapped from open_issues_count, Int). Both classes require the @Serializable annotation and @SerialName for snake_case to camelCase mapping.
